name: Smash Factor Virtual Golf and Lounge
about: Smash Factor Virtual Golf and Lounge offers a premier indoor golf experience in Chino, CA, featuring two distinct simulator options. The Premium Bay houses four Golfzon Two Vision NX simulators, while the Luxury Suite provides a private, elegant setting with one dedicated simulator. Both bay types feature advanced multi-hitting surfaces, auto-teeing systems, and access to over 240 global courses. The venue combines high-end golf technology with a lounge atmosphere, featuring a self-pour beer and seltzer system. It is designed for both serious golf practice and casual social events, with a focus on providing a seamless booking experience through its 24/7 online reservation system.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Golfzon Two Vision NX simulators
Private Luxury Suite option for exclusive events
Premium multi-hitting surfaces and auto-teeing technology

food_and_drink.notes: Customizable catering options available for events.
Self-pour beer and seltzer system (iPourIt) is available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulators with multi-hitting surfaces, auto-teeing, and over 240 courses.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided or if you must bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: You may bring your own non-alcoholic beverages, but alcohol is not allowed. Catering options are available for events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for completing 18 holes of virtual golf.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue hosts birthday parties and is suitable for families.
